scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.check: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../backend && npx tsc --noEmit
scripts.check:registry: if grep -lE 'furycloud|artifacts\.fury|registry\..*\.mercadolibre' package-lock.json backend/package-lock.json frontend/package-lock.json 2>/dev/null; then echo '\n❌ ERROR: package-lock contains private/internal registry URLs. Run: sed -i "" "s|https://npm.artifacts.furycloud.io/repository/all|https://registry.npmjs.org|g" path/to/package-lock.json' && exit 1; else echo '✅ Lock files clean (public npm only)'; fi
